title: Chapter 43: The Baratie Opens Its Doors
main_description: The crew reaches the floating restaurant Baratie, where Luffy’s recklessness and the harsh world of fighting cooks introduce Sanji, Zeff, and the restaurant’s uncompromising code.
key_events: The Straw Hats arrive at the Baratie.
Sanji and Zeff are introduced through conflict.
Luffy becomes entangled with the restaurant and its rules.
